zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Eure I於大約1275年10月18日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，他的父親Hugh de Eure36歲，母親Agnes De Bertram30歲。他與Agnes de Insula結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1322年3月16日之後在英國英格蘭越可爾波洛賀布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Eure I于大约1275年10月18日出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯时，他的父亲Hugh de Eure36岁，母亲Agnes De Bertram30岁。他与Agnes de Insula结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1322年3月16日之后在英国英格兰越可爾波洛賀布利其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Eure I was born about 18 October 1275, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Eure, was 36 and his mother, Agnes De Bertram, was 30. He married Agnes de Insula. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 16 March 1322, in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John d’Eure I est né environ 18 octobre 1275, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh d’Eure, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Bertram, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Insula. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 16 mars 1322, à Boroughbridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Eure I um 18. Oktober 1275 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Eure 36 und seine Mutter Agnes De Bertram 30. Er hat Agnes de Insula geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 16. März 1322 in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Eure I è nato il circa 18 ottobre 1275 nel Warkworth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Eure, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes De Bertram, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Insula. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 16 marzo 1322, nel Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Eure Iが約1275年10月18日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Eureは36歳，母Agnes De Bertramは30歳であった。Agnes de Insulaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1322年3月16日以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボロウブリッジで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Eure I(이)가 대략 1275년 10월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Eure(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes De Bertram(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Agnes de Insula(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 3월 16일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 버루브리지에서 사망했다.

pt.Abt 18 October 1275–Aft 16 March 1322: aproximadamente 18 de outubro de 1275–após 16 de março de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Eure I nasceu aproximadamente 18 de outubro de 1275, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Eure, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Bertram, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Insula. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 16 de março de 1322, em Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Eure I родился около 18 октября 1275 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Eure было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Bertram, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Insula. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 16 марта 1322 г. в местности бороугбридж, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Abt 18 October 1275–Aft 16 March 1322: aproximadamente 18 de octubre de 1275–después de 16 de marzo de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Eure I nació aproximadamente 18 de octubre de 1275, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Eure, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes De Bertram, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Agnes de Insula. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 16 de marzo de 1322, en Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
